hooks.command: j=$(cat); case "$j" in *git*|*gh*|*rm*) printf '%s' "$j" | node "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/guard-destructive-git.cjs" ;; esac

echo '[rehooks defaults] This is the re-hooks (brand: rehooks) React hooks library (published to npm, built with tsup). Conventions: one hook per src/hooks/<name>.hook.ts, re-exported from src/hooks/index.ts; every hook has a typed public API and is SSR-safe (guard window/document/navigator/localStorage). Quality gate before any commit: `bash ralph/check.sh` (tsc --noEmit + tsup build) — there is no test suite yet. NEVER `npm publish` / `npm version` / push git tags — releases are a human step. Autonomous batches: `bash ralph/afk-ralph.sh <N>`; single supervised iteration: `bash ralph/ralph-once.sh`.'
